site.title: Mbootaayu jëfandikukat yi ci wàllu wàllug diggante réew yi
site.tagline: Li jëm ci soxla ci wàllu wàllug jëfandikukat yi
nav.label: Jëfandikukat
meta.home.description: IATF dafay soppi ay soxla yu am solo ci wàllu wàllug mbind mu ubbeeku.
meta.propose.description: Jëfandikoo ab jëfekaay bu jëm ci wàllug jëfandikukat (accessibility project) ci IATF ci web bi, ci email bi, walla ci Discord bi.
meta.governance.description: Jàngal ni IATF di nangu ay jëfekaay, di toppatoo ay dencukaay, ak di denc liggéey bi.
meta.join.description: Yéenekaay yi ñuy jëfandikoo ci IATF: def ay coppite, di tekki, di seetlu, walla di toppatoo ab jëfekaay.
meta.accessibility.description: Naka la IATF bëggoon a sàmm web bii ngir mu am solo te naka lañuy war a yégle benn xalaat ci wàllu am solo.
meta.transparency.description: Jëfandikukat yi nekk ci biir IATF: dogal yi, jëfekaay yi, ak leeral yi ñu def, dañu leen di ubbi.
actions.joinDiscord: Dellu ci xët yi lëkkalook wii
registry.empty.title: Amul benn pexe bu ñu siiwal ba léegi
registry.empty.body: IATF dafay defar ay jëfekaay yu jëkk yu ñuy wax "public project set".
proposal.form.title: Jëlal laaj
proposal.form.body: Toppal form bi ci suuf ngir yónnee ab laaj ci IATF.
proposal.form.noscript: JavaScript dafa soxla ngir jëfandikoo form bii ci web bi. Su fekkee du am, jëfandikool email walla Discord.
proposal.form.runtimeUnavailable: Jëfandikukat bii dafay ubbi sa client de messagerie.
proposal.form.ready: Jëfandikoo bu am solo bi jekk na. Bu ngeen yónnee laaj bi, IATF dina sàkk benn téere bu ñu jël.
proposal.form.turnstileRequired: Yal na nga wéy ci seetlu sàmm spam bi bala nga ko yónnee.
proposal.form.turnstileExpired: Jëfandikukat Spam bi mujj na. Yal nañ ko seetluwaat bala nga ko yónnee.
proposal.form.turnstileError: Jëfandikukat Spam mënul a am solo ci jamono jii. Joxleen ko benn yoon.
proposal.form.turnstileTimeout: Jëfandikukat Spam bi mujj na. Soobleen seetluwaat.
proposal.form.requiredMessage: Yal na nga feesal àll yi ñu soxla, bala nga ko yónnee.
proposal.form.success: Sa ñaan jot na te ñu denc ko ngir ñu seet ko.
proposal.form.successFollowUp: Bu ngeen soppiwaat ak IATF ci mbirum laaj boobu, booleen ci tegtal bi nekk ci suuf.
proposal.form.errorGeneric: Am na lu bon bi ngeen di yónnee laaj bi. Su fekkee ne mbir mi saxul, jëfandikoo email.
project.detail.problemTitle: Lii dafay jéem a jële ay jafe-jafe
project.detail.field.languageNotes: Xët yi jëm ci làkk yi
project.detail.defaultLanguageNotes: Jëfandikoo na ko ci làkku angale, te dees na ko teg ci lu mujj
footer.label: Jëfandikukat site
footer.blurb: Jëfekaay bi ci wàllu wàll gi war na yomb a tàmbalee, yomb a feeñal, te yomb a ubbi.
footer.source: Xët yi lëkkalook wii " Normes d'accessibilité " [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/). Jëfandikoo jëfandikukat yi jëfandikoo ay teknoloj yuy wallu.
contact.label: Jëfandikukat
translation.label: Jëfandikukat
translation.source: Làkku angale mooy làkk bu nekk ci xët wii.
translation.humanReviewed: Jëfandikukat bu am xam-xam ci waxtaanu làkk moo ko seetlu.
translation.machineAssisted: Loolu tekki na ci ay jumtukaay, te kenn ku xam waxtaan bu rafet du ko seetlu ba noppi. Yéenekaay bi dafa am solo ci GitHub.
translation.needsUpdate: Jëf bii dañu koo seetlu bala ñu leeral mbind mu mujj mu nekk ci làkku angale, te mën na am soxla muñ ko.
